node_5.subject: Abigail Chen
node_5.description: This is Abigail Chen's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, start working on the animation project for the client at 9:00 am, have a lunch break at 12:00 pm, continue working on the animation until 3:00 pm, take a break and experiment with different tools and techniques for interactive art from 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm, wrap up the day's work and review progress from 5:00 pm to 6:00 pm, have dinner at 6:00 pm, from 7:00 pm to 9:00 pm.
